audio.transcript: Today's AI engineering briefing. Item 1: Show HN: verbatimeter - check how grounded your LLM / RAG agent is in real-time. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent. Read it through that lens. Item 2: Can we reconstruct a tokenizer using only two oracles from the chat API?. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. No strong keyword match; defaulted to foundations. Read it through that lens. Item 3: Introduction to Reinforcement Learning and Its Role in LLMs. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. No strong keyword match; defaulted to foundations. Read it through that lens. Item 4: 'Ghostcommit' hides prompt injection in images to fool AI agents, steal secrets. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent, prompt. Read it through that lens. Item 5: Choosing the Right AI Agent Memory Strategy: A Decision-Tree Approach. Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. Matched From Prompts to Harnesses on: agent, memory. Read it through that lens. Item 6: Karpathy LLM Wiki (Obsidian Plugin). Relevant to From Prompts to Harnesses. No strong keyword match; defaulted to foundations. Read it through that lens.
